MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Sarah Rashti, Esq. Compass Law Group, LLP (310) 289-7126 for Plaintiff Quindell Edward II Anderson
No other appearances

Matter is not contested. Counsel appeared out of an abundance of caution. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF QUINDELL ANDERSON.

Simon Esfandi/Compass Law Group, LLC's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling using the mandatory JCC Form MC-053.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
